title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: Claude Design is an AI design tool by Anthropic that enables users to build design systems and generate branded landing pages. The tutorial demonstrates a four-step workflow covering design system creation, generation, editing, and deployment, positioning Claude Design as a Figma replacement for certain design tasks.
writeup: The video walks through Claude Design, an AI design tool from Anthropic for building design systems and generating branded landing pages. It demonstrates a four-step workflow: creating a design system, generating output, editing, and deploying. The tutorial frames Claude Design as a Figma replacement for certain design tasks, with code generation and branded content generation as core capabilities.
